channel.title: red meat on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in red meat on Have an average day :|

item.title: BBC News - Red meat increases death, cancer and heart risk, says study
item.description: BBC News – Red meat increases death, cancer and heart risk, says study. I wonder if this is talking about all red meat or just corn fed meat. I seem to remember reading something about how grass fed like buffalo doesn’t have these kinds of problems.
